comment.body:
This is my final response regarding this.

If you give me a “Sharcus Signals” thread where I can post SPX related entries without having to disclose exits, sizing, or stop losses until after the fact, or without updating the trade at all and just letting it hang, then I will have a very successful thread. I will base stop loss sizes on trades and account sizing that is completely unrelated to the “Sharcus Signals” thread and won’t disclose it directly.

Please give me this opportunity, for the next month, as it would help to clarify my point very quickly.

We can start it right now:

Long ES 5416. One leg. Be cautious here.

Also, tomorrow we will scale into an NVDA put, 44 delta, July Expiry (we’ll do the occasional equities option trade as well)

Nothing I have said has been childish or without a thorough explanation.

In fact, the emotional temper tantrums have come from the outrage of other members here.

And I have to agree, any grown man that constantly refers to a random woman who they don’t know as “mommy”, even if out of endearment, or who has an emotional temper tantrum in response to any “perceived” criticism of their “mommy” should be repulsive to any woman looking for a competent, objective, and independent man.

Alma you didn’t directly address my points at all. I have already explained that the position sizing of today’s trade and yesterday’s trades were identical, “2 legs”. So the burden of responsibility would be on you to disclose if those legs are different sizing. There would be no reason to assume the sizing of the legs would be different, especially if you use the same word to describe them. So if the trade sizing was the same, which it was, then you would’ve been stopped out today. 

But either way, please give me a “Sharcus Signals” thread. It will become apparent very quickly why it is pointless to have one in the first place if specifics are not transparently disclosed and updated in real time.

This shouldn’t be hard for anyone to understand here. If this response gets me banned, then so be it. I have said nothing childish or wrong here.

you won't get banned today. only tomorrow, earliest.
Tomorrow you will write the morning analysis and provide trading signal. Deal? ;))

Plp above you explained that half of the profit is not 24 pts. 
And I explained many times: my portfolio is not your portfolio. My account size is not your account size. It is literally unnecessary to provide my exact sizing. 
But if i would do so, then you would cry why do i charge 35 usd per month, when i earn that much... 
So stop this please.
All what you do is distracting, and criticising anybody, but mostly me, without even understanding the subjects in depth.
See how many person gets things right. This place is not for you.

comment.body: some good points to be fair. i posted in the wrong thread earlier in the week, but the sheep mentality in here is a recipe for disaster if you dont control your risk..which only you can do. everyone seems to blindly believe and follow everything Alma says. that's unfair to her to have those expectations. she can and will be wrong often, no one EVER has a consistent high hit rate in the markets over a long enough sample size. dont risk more than you can afford to lose and certainly dont oversize bc Alma has gotten a few calls right.

comment.body:
when we subscribed, there was an unspoken agreement (sometimes spoken as well) that a minimum level of personal responsibility was expected. Your trades are your own, your entries are your own, your exits are your own, etc. Her callouts have been great, market anomalies aside, but even then you should only be using her callouts for entry/exit as extra confluence to your own trading plan. If we all start jumping in blindly and pointing fingers, this forum will devolve into WallStreetBets very fast and we will lose a VVIP and resource.

Sharcus makes some points that make me think, and for that I appreciate his perspective. The only gripe I have is that text is terrible at conveying tone, and people often don't realize their own messages are inflammatory. Add to that any potential language/culture differences and yay.

comment.body:
Rather than worrying about winning or losing in trading, I am more concerned with the prophecy of Garabandal, or that of Yajooj and Majooj (metaphorically)… I hope humanity and its freedom and spirituality would survive this crisis; even though humankind tend to be myopic and to take things for granted… 

If the first island chain breaks, I might just need a literal real lifeboat……

comment.body:
I'd say 95% ish but yeah. Even with 80, if you're planning to do the opposite, you're putting your money on the other 20%. Not to mention the RR. Alma's levels are tough af to break sometimes - so if the price slides through we get massive squeezes both ways. 

The least you can do is sit on your hands, watch, learn, and shut up. But that's just my opinion <insert shouting woman gif here>. The fact that some people's reaction to this content is "booo hooo, too little, can't learn" just blows my mind.

comment.body: Again people reading what they want to see and not what is written on here. Please don’t assume naivety on my part. I did not say Alma posts every trade she makes. I know for a fact Alma does not post every trade she takes, she has said exactly that many many times. She posts when she has high conviction, and her high conviction signals have paid off at least 80% of the time, if followed with good risk management. Who knows about the future but definitely since the start of the signals chat. So please if you haven’t been following the signals don’t gripe about the format along with others as I don’t want us all to lose the privilege of getting signals from an expert.

comment.body: I like the signals chat, but I can like having it and agree with some of Sharcus’ points. But if you think she is posting every trade she takes and hitting at least 80% over a long time frame, I have bad news for you. She’d be a deca millionaire and not doing a paid sub. I like the write ups and signals. My point is more so that it seems everyone thinks Alma is the Bible. That is dangerous if you’re not controlling risk.

comment.body:
Well that's the point. No one shares such knowledge. She's the first and only, at least from what I've found. And that is why she will always have a special place in my heart. 
And as she mentioned, it's not just about high conviction. It's about learning value. Just like with reversion indicator for example. Now I can use it on my own, understanding what when why, etc. Of course it won't hit 100% rate,  but the thing is, it doesn't have to.
